## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests

## Validation

- [ ] `./scripts/run_checks.sh` passes locally
- [ ] Manual browser check completed (`model/bicycle_model.html`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and minimal
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] No secrets added
